title: m009 milestone review score
description: Schema for an M009 milestone review quality score output.

score.description: Weighted composite score of milestone deliverable quality.

confidence.description: Data availability indicator (count of available signals / 4 × 1000).

recommendation.description: Agent recommendation for the milestone deliverable.

evidence_completeness.description: Evidence IRI resolvability and document completeness.

milestone_consistency.description: Consistency with prior milestones and agreement specification.

provider_reputation.description: M010 reputation score of the provider (default 300 if unavailable).
